overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a morning walk through a futuristic urban environment. The player moves from beneath an elevated highway past digital billboards, along busy city streets with moderate traffic, and finally enters a neon-lit district with Japanese architectural elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath elevated highway with digital advertising

events.description: exiting the deep shadow of the overpass into brighter daylight
moving from covered walkway to open street corner with large billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily beneath the elevated highway, passing a newsstand and approaching the open street

notable_agents.action: person standing at the newsstand browsing magazines

entered.detail: retail stand with magazines and newspapers on display
massive concrete highway structure overhead casting shadows
thick structural column supporting the overpass
tall building facade covered with multiple digital advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive elevated highway overpass in deep shadow, with a newsstand on the left and large digital billboards ahead. The player walks forward, transitioning from the dark sheltered area toward the brighter open street where sunlight becomes visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with traffic barriers beneath curving elevated highway

events.description: passing a pedestrian wearing a yellow safety vest
vehicles passing by on the left side of the orange barriers

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to moving traffic, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow safety vest walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: bright orange metal barriers separating sidewalk from street
tall palm trees lining the street median
tall modern building with reflective green glass facade

segments.scene_description: Walking along a city sidewalk protected by orange traffic barriers, with moderate traffic flowing on the left. The elevated highway curves overhead to the right, and palm trees line the street. The player passes a pedestrian in a yellow vest while green glass skyscrapers rise in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit intersection with crosswalk and traffic control

events.description: intense sun glare as the camera faces directly toward the sun
crossing the street at the marked crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection while facing bright sun glare, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving through the intersection ahead

entered.detail: horizontal traffic signal structure spanning the intersection
white painted zebra crossing lines on the asphalt
tall cylindrical apartment building with green-tinted windows

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide intersection with full sky visibility and intense morning sun creating lens flare. The player crosses the street at a marked crosswalk, navigating through other pedestrians while a yellow taxi passes by. Traffic lights hang overhead and a distinctive green residential tower dominates the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market entrance with red neon pillars and Japanese motifs

events.description: entering a darker area illuminated by red neon vertical lights
passing under traditional Japanese torii-style structure with neon red pillars

agents.ego_description: walking into the neon-lit district entrance, passing under red vertical light pillars

entered.detail: tall red glowing neon tubes resembling torii gate pillars
round paper-style lanterns with Japanese characters hanging from ceiling
pedestrian bridge or second level walkway with railings
concrete building with pipes and industrial details

segments.scene_description: Entering a darker, enclosed district entrance illuminated by vivid red neon vertical pillars resembling a traditional Japanese torii gate. The lighting shifts from bright natural sun to artificial neon glow. Traditional paper lanterns hang overhead, and the environment features a mix of industrial architecture and cyberpunk neon signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the deep shadows of an urban underpass into a sun-drenched city center before descending into a neon-lit district. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway overpass in darkness, passing a newsstand and digital billboards as the camera moves toward the brighter open street. As the player emerges from the shelter, the scene shifts to a sidewalk lined with orange traffic barriers and palm trees, with green glass skyscrapers rising in the distance under the curving highway. The environment then opens into a wide, sun-lit intersection where intense morning light creates lens flares as the camera crosses a marked crosswalk amidst pedestrians and passing taxis. Finally, the lighting shifts from natural brilliance to an artificial glow as the camera enters an enclosed district marked by vivid red neon pillars and traditional paper lanterns.
